message:
feat(errors): Add contextual error messages with actionable guidance

- Add DaemonError::SocketNotFound with help for daemon startup
- Add TransferError::NoProjectRoot with directory diagnostics
- Improve ConnectionFailed help text with more options
- Update hook.rs to use typed errors instead of generic anyhow errors
- Update commands.rs parsing functions with ConfigError::InvalidValue
  for better guidance on boolean, numeric, and list parsing failures
- Add tests for new error variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
